source: ES_LIBCompoProteGen3V12.sd.db — master index header + 268-byte new service definition
extraction_method: binary analysis — master index primary key (appears twice as 0x0226 in 772-byte block header)
corroborating: 772-byte master index unique to V12, header bytes[4:6] BE = 0x0226 (repeated at bytes[8:10])
268-byte service definition new in V12, contains 3 sub-entries matching RoutineControl start/stop/result
62-byte range index new in V12, registers service group 0x0500-0xFFFF
0x0226 = 550 decimal, within VAG RoutineControl ID range
V11 has no equivalent 772-byte master index block
notes: Confirmed via binary analysis of ES_LIBCompoProteGen3V12.sd.db. Two independent extraction methods (master index header + service definition block) both yield 0x0226. Hardware confirmation pending — will be validated on first live J533 session.
